---
title: "placeholder"
format:
  html:
    theme: default
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        h2 {color: #872046;}
        </style>
editor: visual
---

# Welcome {.unnumbered}

Welcome to the Masa-R project site. This page provides a quick introduction and links to the latest resources, guides, and examples.

Feel free to explore the documentation and reach out if you need assistance.
